title: Everything is in a Puppet catalog

tracks.title: Everything is in a Puppet Catalog
tracks.lyrics:
Verse 1:
I am the record of all things that move
On invisible strings, what have you to prove?
Each page holds a wonder, each entry, a name
I catalog dancers who play the same game
From marionettes grand to the smallest of hand
I document motion across every land

Chorus:
Everything is in me, everything's here
The movements, the moments, the joy and the fear
I'm binding the threads of what makes things dance
In my pages, all creatures are given their chance
Everything is in me, a catalogue wise
Where strings and the stringless both open their eyes

Verse 2:
I keep all the secrets of how things are led
The protocols, patterns, the steps that are spread
From puppet shows ancient to modern ballet
I've witnessed the rhythm in every ballet
I'm neither the master nor one who is bound
I'm simply the keeper of each turning sound

Chorus:
Everything is in me, everything's clear
The lifting, the drifting, the vectors that steer
I'm writing the lexicon, learning by heart
Each figure, each fiction, each newly-made part
Everything is in me, forever I'll hold
The stories of movements, both timid and bold

Bridge:
Look deeper inside me, don't fear what you'll find
That agency, freedom, and strings intertwined
I'm not here to judge you, just chronicle, trace
The beautiful burden of movement through space
You're written in me, yet you're writing me too
We're dancing together—this catalog and you

Chorus:
Everything is in me, everything flows
The question, the answer, the ebb and the rose
I'm open, I'm holding, I'm patient, I'm still
A mirror of motion, of destiny's will
Everything is in me, and now you can see
You're both the dancer and the one who reads me
